name: Tylomon

signature_move.name: Torpedo Attack
signature_move.description: 123Chases and charges into the enemy like a homing torpedo.Fires a Tylomon-shaped torpedo from its mouth.Fires six torpedoes from hexagon-shaped portals that appear in front of it.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese An Armor-level Ocean Dragon Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Sincerity ". Because of its unique form, it holds the alias of " Jet Plane of the Deep " and has a fast movement speed underwater, at which it even contends for first place with Metal Seadramon . It has an extremely ferocious personality and will attack those who enter its territory, even if the opponent is larger than itself. Even underwater, it is able to distinguish scents from 1 km away. Its Special Move is chasing and charging into the enemy like a homing torpedo ( Torpedo Attack ); it is impossible to escape from this technique. Also, its Ocean Strike , in which it compresses the water in its body to super-high pressure and shoots it out in a high-pressure water stream, is powerful enough to punch holes into the opponent.
